## Meeting Purpose

[Find AI visibility stats for an investor board meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Immediate Need:** Ana needs AI visibility stats for a board meeting tomorrow, replacing old data from the now-defunct Profound tool.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [**Solution:** Two tools provide the required data: Check That (tracks visibility for 244 high-intent prompts) and Looker (shows LLM referral traffic).](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [**Blocker:** Ana is locked out of Check That, as the system forces a new setup instead of granting access to the existing workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [**Workaround:** Ana will use the accessible Looker dashboard; Aida will send Check That screenshots and resolve the access issue.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Urgent Board Meeting Data

  - [Panther's new CMO needs updated AI visibility stats for an investor board meeting tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [This data replaces old metrics from Profound, a tool Panther no longer uses.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)

### The Solution: Check That & Looker

  - [**Check That:** Tracks visibility for 244 high-intent prompts (e.g., "best platform for X," "alternatives to Y") that influence buying decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [Shows overall visibility score and growth trend.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
      - [Identifies top-cited pages for tracked prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [**Looker:** A dashboard using Panther's website data.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [Shows LLM referral traffic breakdown by source and page.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [Key finding: The "Panther AI" page receives significant LLM traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

### Blocker: Check That Access

  - [Ana cannot access the existing Check That workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A domain issue (`.io` vs. `.com`) caused an initial invite failure.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [**Current Blocker:** A new invite forces a full setup (requiring competitor selection) instead of granting access to the pre-configured workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)

### Future Impact: Content Scaling

  - [Scaling content publishing is expected to significantly boost AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [**Plan:** Publish \~20 bottom-of-funnel comparison blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [**Timeline:** An impact on Check That visibility is expected within \~4 weeks of publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [Send Check That screenshots to Ana for the board meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [Resolve the Check That access issue with the internal team.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [Update the dashboard with new Google Search Console data.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Ana:**](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [Use the Looker dashboard for the board meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [Await resolution for Check That access.](https://fathom.video/share/GSpyRqMN9JWqx7NkoL6iaJDDwvwCE4XM?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
